fields.name: Cash Flow Forecast No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: Receivables CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the receivables account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: Payables CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payables account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: Sales Order CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales order account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: Purch. Order CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purchase order account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: FA Budget CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fixed asset budget account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: FA Disposal CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fixed asset disposal account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: CF No. on Chart in Role Center
Job CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the project account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: Automatic Update Frequency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the automatic update frequency of the cash flow forecast. The Cash Flow Forecast with "Show in Chart on Role Center" set will be used for the automatic update.

fields.name: Tax CF Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax account number that is used in cash flow forecasts.

fields.name: Taxable Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies how often tax payment is registered.

fields.name: Tax Payment Window
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for calculating how soon after the previous tax period finished, the tax payment is registered.

fields.name: Tax Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the balancing account that your taxes are paid to.

fields.name: Tax Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balancing account that your taxes are paid to.

fields.name: API URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the API URI to the AzureML instance.

fields.name: Variance %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the range of deviation, plus or minus, that you'll accept in the forecast. Lower percentages represent more accurate forecasts, and are typically between 20 and 40. Forecasts outside the range are considered inaccurate, and do not display.

fields.name: Historical Periods
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of historical periods to include in the forecast.

fields.name: Horizon
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many periods you want the forecast to cover.

fields.name: Period Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of period that you want to see the forecast by.

fields.name: Time Series Model
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time series model to be used for the cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Azure AI Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies status of Azure AI forecast.
